title: coryphantha elephantidens subsp. elephantidens
intro: Coryphantha elephantidens subsp. elephantidens, also known as the elephant's-tusk cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Coryphantha. This plant is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Coryphantha elephantidens subsp. elephantidens include its potential to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
